answer_normalization.applied_to: both the parsed and the expected answer, every arm, both instruments
answer_normalization.definition: re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip(), then re.sub(r'\s*>\s*', '>', s), then re.sub(r'\s*;\s*', ';', s)
